# Gemini CLI — Engineering Log

Shared project instructions: `.ai/harness/AGENTS.md` (read it).

## Gemini-Specific

**Rules**: Inline key rules below. See `.ai/harness/rules/RULES.md` for full index.
**Skills**: `.gemini/skills/on-call-log-entry/SKILL.md` — on-call incident log skill.
**@imports**: Use `@.ai/harness/ddd-project.md` and `@.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md` at session start.

## Inline Key Rules

### Anchor Context (MUST)
Before any work: read `.ai/harness/ddd-project.md` + `.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md` + scoped lessons from `.ai/memory/lessons-learned.json`.

### Domain Vocabulary
Use ONLY terms from `.ai/harness/ddd-ubiquitous-language.md`. Never invent synonyms for VPP, FBE, Trade Platform, ArgoCD, etc.

### On-Call Logs
On-call incidents → `log/employer/eneco/02_on_call_shift/{YYYY_MM_DD}_{slug}/` with context.md + rca.md + fix.md. RCAs MUST use A1/A2/A3 evidence labels.

### Memory Update (End of Session)
Update `.ai/memory/lessons-learned.json` with new LL-{NNN} entries before ending.

## Task Workspace

Task IDs MUST be allocated with `.ai/harness/scripts/claim-task-id.sh <slug>`.
All task artifacts → `.ai/tasks/{task_id}_{slug}/`.
Per-session state → `.ai/runtime/current-task/{session_id}.json`.
